metadata.name: 中考中译英句子填空
metadata.description: 根据中文提示，完成英文句子

questions.chinese: 你不必做许多事情来照顾你的牡蛎。
questions.english: You don’t have to do a lot to ______ your oysters.
questions.explanation: look after 意为'照顾'，固定短语。

questions.chinese: 我哥哥最喜欢的动物是狮子。
questions.explanation: favorite animal 意为'最喜欢的动物'，这里需要填写完整的名词短语。

questions.chinese: ——你应该什么时候到家？——下午五点之前。
questions.explanation: 询问时间用疑问词 when，加上情态动词 should 表示'应该'。

questions.chinese: ——这些企鹅来自哪里？——它们来自南极洲。
combinedCorrectForms: Where do the penguins come from
questions.explanation:
询问来源可以用：
- Where do the penguins come from?
- Where are the penguins from?
主语是复数，所以用 do 或 are。

questions.chinese: ——珍妮和杰克为什么这么开心？——因为今天是他们的结婚纪念日。
questions.english: ______ are Jenny and Jack so happy? —______ today is their wedding anniversary.
combinedCorrectForms: Why are Jenny and Jack so happy? / Because today is their wedding anniversary.
Why are they so happy? / Because it's their wedding anniversary.
questions.explanation: 第一空询问原因用 Why，第二空回答原因用 Because。
